skills.name: harness-setup
skills.description: Generate a Claude Code harness for your project. Auto-detects stack (Next.js, Laravel, Spring Boot). Generates CLAUDE.md, settings.json, and safety hooks. Run /shipwithai-harness:setup

skills.name: harness-doctor
skills.description: Diagnose and fix your Claude Code harness. Scans CLAUDE.md, settings.json, hooks health, and stack consistency. Produces scored report with actionable fixes.
